opening_line: Hi - I read a review where Harriet mentioned tidy finishes on a job with Corvell ltd. That stood out.
source_quote: We found Corvell on Instagram & was really impressed from the get go when Jack came to measure up to quote for some tiling in our kitchen, utility & wc - his attention to detail in checking exactly what we wanted & advising on tiles/grout etc was so useful! The quote was so competitively priced we b
why_this_angle: Lead with review detail about tidy finishes (Harriet)
suggested_whatsapp: Hi, Julius here. I build websites for local trades. One of your Google reviews from Harriet mentioned tidy finishes - I mocked up a one-page site around that. No obligation - want a quick look?

follow_up_replies.text: One-page site from £300. Includes mobile layout and quote form.
No problem - I will remove the preview. Thanks for your time.
